label: Strategy Summary
description: Active strategy count, total AUM, total P&L, and MTD P&L with current execution mode badge.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: each metric value rendered as '—' when isLoading.

0.7.note: shows 0 / 0 Active Strategies and zeroed totals when no strategies — acceptable for a summary strip.

0.8.note: error boundary at WidgetWrapper; context silently falls back to DEFAULT_STRATEGIES, no error field exposed.

0.9.note: no dead code. No changes required.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [strategies]. 0.4 ✓ no any / @ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ no lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 ✓ each metric value rendered as '—' when isLoading. 0.7 ✓ shows 0 / 0 Active Strategies and zeroed totals when no strategies — acceptable for a summary strip. 0.8 ✓ error boundary at WidgetWrapper; context silently falls back to DEFAULT_STRATEGIES, no error field exposed. 0.9 ✓ no dead code. No changes required.

1.2.note: context reads useGlobalScope(), filters via getStrategyIdsForScope + getClientIdsForOrgs.

1.3.note: org filter change propagates through context.

1.7.note: no reference data in widget or lib/mocks.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ data from useStrategiesData() only. 1.2 ✓ context reads useGlobalScope(), filters via getStrategyIdsForScope + getClientIdsForOrgs. 1.3 ✓ org filter change propagates through context. 1.4 ✓ client cascade via getClientIdsForOrgs. 1.5 ✓ strategy filter via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 ✓ empty arrays → DEFAULT_STRATEGIES (all). 1.7 ✓ no reference data in widget or lib/mocks.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings: L0-0.8: StrategiesDataProvider does not expose an error field — it silently falls back to DEFAULT_STRATEGIES on API failure. Error boundary at WidgetWrapper level is the error gate. No widget-level fix possible without modifying context (READ ONLY for this pass).
